reasoning: High packet loss on the E2 interface has cascaded into degraded throughput and increased latency across the same interface.
actionable_steps:
1. Inspect the physical and virtual links of the E2 interface for congestion or hardware failure.
2. Check the E2 Agent (in the CU/DU) and E2 termination point (in the RIC) for synchronization errors or software crashes.
3. Verify the configuration of the transport network (TN) facilitating the E2 traffic.
